title: The BIZARRE Connection Between UFOs and Nukes

transcript.text: the year was 1964. we're on Vandenberg
Air Force Base a classified program is
taking place called Atlas testing dummy
nuclear warheads being launched from
intercontinental ballistic missiles
a photo instrumentation specialist
Lieutenant Bob Jacobs was tasked with
capturing the launch of the two missiles
from a hundred miles north of Vandenberg
at Big Sur and the missile popped up
through the fog we always thought it was
a smoke Trail going off into Subspace
but what he caught on camera would
change his life and his understanding of
the universe forever a flying saucer
flying 8 000 miles per hour not only
seemed to encircle the missile it shot
four directed energy beams at it causing
it to Tumble off its intended trajectory
and I said
it looks like we got a UFO
